name: Brookwood Golf Academy
about: IMA Brookwood Golf Club is a championship 18-hole facility owned and operated by the IMA Recreation Association. The course, designed by Joe Szilagyi, was established in 1938 and features four sets of tee boxes to accommodate all skill levels, offering both a picturesque and challenging layout with good speed of play. The venue provides an indoor golf simulator experience, allowing golfers to continue practicing regardless of weather conditions, complemented by professional golf instruction and junior programs for developing players.
why_golfers_like_it: Indoor simulator facility available for weather-independent practice
Professional golf instruction and junior development programs
Championship course with multiple tee boxes for all skill levels
Social leagues and outings for community engagement

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify, but it's recommended to bring your own clubs for the best simulator experience. Club rentals may be available but aren't mentioned.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The website doesn't mention food or drink service, suggesting it may be a bring-your-own venue for the simulator area.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify simulator session times, but typical simulator rounds take 1-2 hours depending on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, IMA Brookwood offers junior golf programs and is mentioned as a great place for kids, particularly through their First Tee program.
